category_sources: source_facts.description says COBOL85-202x compiler; official Savannah summary describes GnuCOBOL as a free modern COBOL compiler.
display_name_sources: Official homepage, Savannah summary, and source_facts.name use GnuCOBOL.
docs_sources: Official GnuCOBOL site publishes the GnuCOBOL manual and FAQ under gnucobol.sourceforge.io.
repo_sources: Official Savannah GnuCOBOL Subversion page lists anonymous checkout under svn.savannah.gnu.org/gnucobol with trunk as the typical module.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official Savannah summary identify a COBOL compiler translating COBOL to C/native executables.
